title: dioscorea gracillima var. collettii
intro: Dioscorea gracillima var. collettii, also known as Chinese yam or Collett's yam, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as improving digestion, reducing blood sugar levels, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Dioscorea gracillima var. collettii is often prepared as a herbal supplement or tea, and its tubers can be cooked and consumed as a nutritious food source.
